title: Blackspur BB-SD411 Quick Change Drill Bit Set
features: Set includes 1 quick change chuck, 1 bit holder, 15 CRV Bits, 4 HSS drills and 3 wood drills
Content sizes: quick change chuck, bit holder, 10x 25mm bits, 5x 50mm bits, 4x HSS drills (2-5mm) and 3x wood drills (13mm, 19mm and 22mm).
description: Product Description Blackspur quick change drill bit set includes 1 quick change chuck, 1 bit holder, 15 CRV Bits, 4 HSS drills and 3 wood drills. Easy to use. Durable. Content sizes: quick change chuck, bit holder, 10x 25mm bits, 5x 50mm bits, 4x HSS drills (2-5mm) and 3x wood drills (13mm, 19mm and 22mm). Packed in double blister. Supplying quality products. One of the most comprehensive ranges of hand tools and DIY associated products in the UK. Box Contains 1x Quick Change Chuck 1x Bit Holder 15x CRV Bits 4x Hss Drills 3x Wood Drills
